title: Rahul Gandhi pays tribute to Kanshi Ram ahead of birth anniversary, vows to fight for marginalised
description: “Today we remember Kanshi Ram ji’s struggle, his vision, and his influence on Indian politics. I thank him wholeheartedly. We pledge to follow his path and fight for the issues of marginalised sections. If the Congress had functioned effectively at that time, Kanshi Ram would not have needed to wage a separate struggle,” Rahul Gandhi
